be96769912e4.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
be96769912e4.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
be96769912e4.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

4117bc786cbf.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
4117bc786cbf.description: At 3.7/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
4117bc786cbf.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

0343f17b84bc.title: Close the hygiene gap — 2 to 5
0343f17b84bc.description: An FSA rating of 2 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
0343f17b84bc.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

b9886c86ed80.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
b9886c86ed80.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

e5834c01568e.title: Ranked #5 of 5 locally — peers are ahead
e5834c01568e.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

f3a18a20ab88.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
f3a18a20ab88.description: You trail peers by 3.7 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c85ab38150e5.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
c85ab38150e5.description: You trail peers by 2.8 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
